title: EVgo Q4 2023 Earnings Preview
text: EVgo Q4 2023 earnings preview outlined expectations for the quarter. The consensus EPS estimate was -$0.09, representing a 50% year-over-year improvement. The consensus revenue estimate was $44.31 million, representing 62.7% year-over-year growth. Over the prior year, EVgo had beaten EPS estimates 50% of the time and beaten revenue estimates 50% of the time. Actual Q4 2023 results showed strong performance: For the full year 2023, revenue reached $161 million, an increase of 195% over full year 2022, exceeding the high-end of the company's guidance range. Network throughput reached a record 50 gigawatt-hours in Q4, an increase of 257% year-over-year. However, net loss was $36.6 million for Q4 2023 and $135.5 million for the full year 2023. The company's strong revenue growth in 2023 demonstrated successful scaling of its charging network and eXtend commercial partnerships.
